title: How did Dr Naoko Akagi die
display_title: How did Dr Naoko Akagi die
wikitext:
[]: How did Dr. Naoko Akagi die? Post by MisatoCrush » Sun Jan 19, 2014 12:30 am The wikia page says Naoko threw herself off a platform and died from the fall, but when I watched the show I clearly remember thinking she shot herself in the head, and I thought I recalled a gunshot sound. Was that the sound of her hitting the ground? I also thought it showed an image of her dead both, a pool of blood, and child Rei all still on the same platform. If she was horrified about strangling child Rei, why would she fling her newly dead body off the platform with her?

[]: Post by ApolloIVtv » Sun Jan 19, 2014 1:17 am Well, I'm pretty sure she jumped to her death. If you watch the scene again, she's located above the magi systems, where you usually see Misato and her crew during Angel battles, and in the next scene, you see blood splattered below that area. It seems as if her head bashed on the edge of one of the magi, and then you see a chalk outline of her body, showing a "falling-like" position:

[]: Post by MisatoCrush » Sun Jan 19, 2014 1:34 am Shoot my bad. I totally misremembered that scene. Towards the end there was so much happening so fast it seemed. But hey! Just another reason to rewatch it all again right? Am I right?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jan 19, 2014 12:25 pm OP has been addressed, closing.

Article: How did Dr Naoko Akagi die
[]: How did Dr. Naoko Akagi die? Post by MisatoCrush » Sun Jan 19, 2014 12:30 am The wikia page says Naoko threw herself off a platform and died from the fall, but when I watched the show I clearly remember thinking she shot herself in the head, and I thought I recalled a gunshot sound. Was that the sound of her hitting the ground? I also thought it showed an image of her dead both, a pool of blood, and child Rei all still on the same platform. If she was horrified about strangling child Rei, why would she fling her newly dead body off the platform with her?

[]: Post by ApolloIVtv » Sun Jan 19, 2014 1:17 am Well, I'm pretty sure she jumped to her death. If you watch the scene again, she's located above the magi systems, where you usually see Misato and her crew during Angel battles, and in the next scene, you see blood splattered below that area. It seems as if her head bashed on the edge of one of the magi, and then you see a chalk outline of her body, showing a "falling-like" position:

[]: Post by MisatoCrush » Sun Jan 19, 2014 1:34 am Shoot my bad. I totally misremembered that scene. Towards the end there was so much happening so fast it seemed. But hey! Just another reason to rewatch it all again right? Am I right?
